hero.subtitle: General contractor specializing in interior systems for over 10 years, rooted on the South Shore of Montreal.

story.title: Who we are
story.p1: Located on the South Shore of Montreal, in the Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu region, Groupe B.C.M. has established itself as a trusted player in Quebec's construction industry. Our vision has taken shape over the years thanks to a team of specialists united by strong relationships and a shared passion for excellence.
story.p2: As a general contractor specializing in interior systems, we plan, manage and execute your projects from A to Z — whether residential, commercial or industrial construction. Our approach combines decades of experience with a constant openness to innovation and new technologies.
advantages: Over 10 years of construction experience in Quebec
Team of qualified and certified professionals (RBQ)
Complete and transparent project management from start to finish
Strict adherence to OHS safety standards
Exclusive use of superior quality materials
After-sales service and full warranties on our work

milestones.event: Creation of Groupe B.C.M. in Saint-Jean-sur-Richelieu, focused on excellence in residential service
Major shift towards commercial and industrial sectors, securing innovative contracts on the South Shore
Consolidation of our interior systems expertise and deployment of specialized drywall and framing teams

items.title: Excellence
items.desc: Uncompromising standards guide every decision, from design to delivery.

items.title: Reliability
items.desc: We keep our word. Our clients count on us to honour commitments, deadlines and budgets.

items.title: Punctuality
items.desc: A project delivered late is costly. We master our schedules with rigour.

items.title: Collaboration
items.desc: We work with you, not just for you. Open communication at every stage.

cta.title: Ready to build something?
cta.desc: Our team is available to discuss your project and provide a free, no-obligation estimate.

hero.subtitle: Interior systems specialists — from project management to qualified labour rental.

items.title: Metal Framing
items.desc: Installation of metal framing systems for interior partitions and exterior walls, offering strength, precision and fast execution.

items.title: Insulation & Soundproofing
items.desc: Installation of high-performance thermal and acoustic insulation systems to improve comfort and reduce energy costs in your buildings.

items.title: Drywall Installation
items.desc: Professional installation of drywall panels for partitions and ceilings, with careful finishes adapted to commercial and industrial requirements.

items.title: Plastering
items.desc: Application of traditional and contemporary plaster for durable and aesthetic surfaces. Recognized expertise on commercial and institutional projects.

items.title: Suspended Ceilings
items.desc: Design and installation of acoustic and decorative suspended ceiling systems for commercial spaces, offices and institutional establishments.

items.title: Acoustic Treatment
items.desc: Design and installation of acoustic solutions to improve sound comfort in your residential, commercial and industrial spaces.

items.title: Project Management
items.desc: Rigorous planning, coordination and monitoring of your projects from start to finish. Your single point of contact managing every detail for you.

items.title: Labour Rental
items.desc: Provision of qualified and certified workers to reinforce your teams for short or long-term needs, with total flexibility.

steps.title: Consultation
steps.desc: Free initial meeting to understand your needs, budget and deadlines.

steps.title: Planning
steps.desc: Development of the project plan, detailed estimates and schedule.

steps.title: Execution
steps.desc: Work carried out with continuous supervision and regular communication.

steps.title: Delivery
steps.desc: Handover with final inspection, documentation and full warranties.

intro.title: Build your career with us
intro.p1: As a well-established general contractor specializing in interior systems, we are always looking for workers to help continue developing our company.
intro.p2: Come share your experience or learn within a dynamic team. Whether you are a seasoned professional or just starting out, we have a place for you.
